g.title: serial.distribution:record_entry->serial.record_entry:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (record_entry) REFERENCES serial.record_entry(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: serial.distribution:subscription->serial.subscription:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (subscription) REFERENCES serial.subscription(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: serial.distribution:holding_lib->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (holding_lib) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: serial.distribution:receive_call_number->asset.call_number:id

g.title: serial.distribution:bind_call_number->asset.call_number:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (bind_call_number) REFERENCES asset.call_number(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: serial.distribution:receive_unit_template->asset.copy_template:id

g.title: serial.distribution:bind_unit_template->asset.copy_template:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (bind_unit_template) REFERENCES asset.copy_template(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: serial.basic_summary:distribution->serial.distribution:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (distribution) REFERENCES serial.distribution(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: serial.index_summary:distribution->serial.distribution:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (distribution) REFERENCES serial.distribution(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: serial.distribution_note:distribution->serial.distribution:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (distribution) REFERENCES serial.distribution(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: serial.stream:distribution->serial.distribution:id
